ocr.text: In examining the inflows and outflows across various fund types, this report highlights critical trends within GIC Private
Limited’s multi-asset portfolio. The analysis is particularly focused on significant movements in FixedIncome and RealEstate
allocations. Notably, the PrivateEquity category has experienced notable outflows, reflecting broader market sentiments and
investment strategies. This has implications for future allocations as we seek to optimize the portfolio’s risk-return profile. In
the context of overall fund performance, we observe that the CHF800M inflows into RealEstate signify a robust interest in this
asset type, which contrasts sharply with the prevailing outflows noted in other segments. The allocation percentages also reveal
strategic positioning, with Bonds demonstrating a targeted allocation that aligns with our risk management objectives.

As we continue to refine our strategy, understanding the dynamics of inflows and outflows will be pivotal in navigating market
uncertainties and enhancing overall portfolio resilience.
